channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Le double visage du leasing social, un vélo électrique Canyon futuriste et batteries au sodium : voici notre Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été marquée cette semaine par le retour du leasing social, la percée technologique de BMW et BYD, ainsi que l’essor des batteries au sodium et des innovations électriques signées MG, Kia et Canyon. Voici les articles les plus lus sur Frandroid.

item.title: The first Story-Rich showcase was packed with narrative-driven games
item.description: Fellow Traveller, the publisher behind games like Titanium Court and 1000xResist, just wrapped up its Story-Rich Showcase, which featured a bunch of narrative-driven indie games. With more than 20 games on display, there was a lot to follow, but we've pulled together some of the most notable announcements below. You can also catch the full […]

item.title: ‘Chasing every model release is a fool's errand and a fast track to AI fatigue inside your organisation’: GoodData.AI CTO says businesses should focus on automation use cases over every single new release
item.description: GoodData.AI CTO Peter Fedorocko says AI is an efficiency amplifier that won't replace humans, but businesses must focus on real automation use cases.

item.title: Burn-9 makes an entire game out of Metal Gear's Codec scenes
item.description: Plus, check out the new trailer for the cosmic horror game Penguin Colony.

item.title: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
item.description: GOG sent a newsletter about the game The End of the Sun on June 5th that included symbols associated with the Nazi SS. The Steam competitor issued a statement attributing the inclusion to a "series of mistakes," including miscommunication with the German QA team, inconsistent font rendering, and being understaffed during a bank holiday, among […]

item.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
item.description: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

item.title: Astronomers measure the mass of a dormant black hole, our solar system's lost protoplanet, and more science stories
Qu’est-ce qui est jaune et qui attend ? Wolverine en précommande à son meilleur prix sur PS5
item.description: La rentrée 2026 va être chargée en termes de sorties vidéoludiques, avec notamment le Marvel's Wolverine d'Insomniac Games que vous pouvez précommander à 61,99 euros sur Auchan ou 62 euros sur Carrefour avec 5 euros en bons d'achat.

item.title: Meilleur smartphone étanche : quel téléphone IP68 choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Avis aux maladroites et maladroits : bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs smartphones étanches, c'est-à-dire totalement résistants à l'eau (certification IP68), pour que les accidents aquatiques soient sans conséquences.

item.title: The cutest games from the Wholesome Direct 2026 showcase
item.description: Every year at Summer Game Fest, nestled in between the splashy blockbuster showcases, the Wholesome Direct provides a nice change of pace. It's similarly packed with games - this year's edition had more than 50 - but the vibe is more chill and, well, wholesome. As in years past, I've pulled out some of the […]

item.title: How to watch Bolivia vs Scotland: Free Streams & TV Guide for World Cup warm-up
item.description: All the ways to watch Bolivia vs Scotland live streams online and from anywhere in one of the last friendlies before the 2026 World Cup gets underway.

item.title: ‘Nothing is trying to reposition hardware as something expressive, not just a neutral container for software’: design experts on why Nothing's Charli XCX collaboration makes sense in the ‘boring’ age of smartphones
item.description: The pop sensation’s collab with sleek UK-based phone maker Nothing is infused with the fashion sense that smartphones desperately need.

item.title: Cozy Grove: Camp Spirit is coming to all the consoles and PC on July 15
item.description: Spry Fox's most adorable life sim hits the big screens.

item.title: The big budget Avatar: The Last Airbender RPG is no longer in production
item.description: The Avatar RPG has been put in an iceberg.

item.title: 'Not 300 but almost': A lone Ukrainian robot held a key position against hordes of Russian attackers for a staggering 45 days
item.description: The unmanned ground vehicle (UGV)'s feat is one of many on a battlefield where both factions increasingly rely on robots and drones to handle some of their most dangerous tasks.

item.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
item.description: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

item.title: Summer Game Fest 2026: All the news from gaming’s busiest week
item.description: Get ready for some gaming news. It’s officially June, which means splashy new events from PlayStation, Xbox, and gaming hype man Geoff Keighley, as well as a bunch of smaller events with hidden gems. PlayStation kicked things off with a big event that featured a new look at Wolverine ahead of its September launch, a […]
